data.title: Office leasing activity up 5% in 2025, Boston top growth market. 410M square feet leased. Lowest level in 15 years in 2024.
data.description: In the U.S., office leasing activity experienced a 5% year-over-year increase, as per data from CoStar. The city of Boston saw the highest growth in this metric. According to CoStar's year-end report, office tenants leased around 410 million square feet of space in 2025. This marked a rise from the previous year, in which leasing volume hit its lowest point in 15 years, excluding the impact of 2020.

data.title: Key resolutions passed at AB Amber Grid's Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders.
data.description: A new report released today reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, a significant increase from the 3.2% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. This forecast is based on the accelerated pace of COVID-19 vaccinations and the additional fiscal support provided by governments around the world. The report also highlights that advanced economies are expected to grow by 5.4% this year, while emerging market and developing economies are projected to grow by 6%. However, the recovery remains uneven, with low-income countries facing significant challenges. Inflation is also expected to rise to 2% in advanced economies and to 4% in emerging markets and developing economies.	Global trade volume is forecasted to increase by 8.4% in 2021, following a 5.3% contraction in 2020. This rebound in trade is attributed to the strong recovery in manufacturing and increased consumer spending. Additionally, commodity prices are expected to rise by 30% in 2021, driven by the surge in demand as well as supply constraints. Despite these positive trends, the report warns that the global economy continues to face uncertainties, including the uneven distribution of vaccines, the potential for new COVID-19 variants, and geopolitical tensions. It underscores the importance of continued policy support to ensure a sustained and inclusive recovery.

data.title: Soft hiring reported despite decrease in unemployment. Trump tariff ruling may impact markets.
data.description: The implementation of potential tariffs by the Trump administration might have a significant impact on the financial markets. According to the latest jobs report, the hiring rate is lower than expected, leading to concerns about the economy. Despite this, the unemployment rate has decreased. This live coverage provides detailed updates on these developments.

data.title: High-grade antimony results on Bald Hill Property show positive outcome from 2025 drill campaign under Globex's option.
data.description: In Toronto on Jan. 09, 2026, Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. shared positive news with shareholders regarding Antimony Resources Corp.'s final drill results from the 2025 campaign on the Bald Hill Antimony property under an option from Globex. The results were reported on various stock exchanges including GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on Frankfurt, Stuttgart, Berlin, Munich, Tradegate, Lang & Schwarz, LS Exchange, TTMzero, Düsseldorf, and Quotrix Düsseldorf Stock Exchanges, and GLBXF on OTCQX International in the US. To review the initial announcement of the option, dated January 22, 2025, click on the press release link provided.

data.title: CVS Health to discuss Q4 & full year 2025 earnings on Feb. 11 at 8:00 a.m. ET with analysts and investors.
data.description: CVS Health (NYSE: CVS) has scheduled a conference call on February 11th, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2025. The discussion with analysts and investors will be available via an audio webcast.

data.title: Citadel Completions rebrands as Citadel Aviation, expanding global services. LA, Jan 9, 2026 - reflects transition from VIP compl. to aviation services.
data.description: In Lake Charles, Louisiana on January 9, 2026, it was announced that Citadel Completions has officially rebranded as Citadel Aviation. This change signifies the company's shift from a VIP completions specialist to a full-service global aviation provider. The transformation showcases Citadel Aviation's commitment to offering a wide range of aviation services.

data.title: Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) reports strong Q2 results, in talks with new tenant. Analyst sets $41 PT.
data.description: Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) exceeded expectations in the second quarter of fiscal 2026 and is in advanced discussions with a potential new hyperscaler tenant, as per information from Needham. Analyst John Todaro from Applied Digital reiterated a Buy rating and set a price target of $41. The company's quarterly revenues and adjusted EBITDA align with Needham's projections, highlighting the positive outlook for Applied Digital. Further details on this development can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Southwest stock gets double upgrade; Delta earnings upcoming. Airline poised for breakout.
data.description: A major boost for Southwest Airlines as its stock receives a double upgrade, showcasing strong potential for growth. With an attractive setup in place, the airline is poised for success ahead of the upcoming earnings season. Meanwhile, Delta Airlines is gearing up to report its earnings, adding to the anticipation within the airline industry. This positive development hints at a potential breakout for the airline sector, as highlighted by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Unemployment rate decreases despite slow hiring. Trump tariff ruling may impact markets. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The market may experience fluctuations due to a potential tariff decision by Trump. Despite modest hiring levels, the latest jobs report indicates a decrease in the unemployment rate. More information is available on Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.

data.title: Michael Baker International integrates Infinity into its business, strengthening MEP, structural, and fire protection engineering sectors.
data.description: Engineering firm Michael Baker International has recently enhanced its competitive standing in Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing (MEP), Structural, and Fire Protection Engineering. The company, based in Pittsburgh, made this announcement on January 9, 2026. Michael Baker International is a key player in providing technology-driven engineering and consulting services worldwide.

data.title: SuperCom secures second new electronic monitoring contract in Texas, solidifying rapid expansion in the state.
data.description: SuperCom, a leading global provider of secure solutions for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity, has been chosen by a juvenile probation agency to replace their current technology provider. This decision highlights the company's rapid expansion as stated on Jan. 9, 2026. SuperCom, listed on the NASDAQ under SPCB, is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.

data.title: Canadian Banc Corp. has successfully completed an overnight offering of Preferred Shares (TSX: BK.PR.A) with gross proceeds of $103.2 million.
data.description: In Toronto on January 9, 2026, Canadian Banc Corp. successfully concluded the marketing of Preferred Shares (TSX: BK.PR.A). The offering is anticipated to generate roughly $103.2 million in total gross proceeds.
